name: aa / Airlines workflow 505
task: Find the lowest travel time flight for 1 traveler from JFK, NYC to Heathrow, London on April 19, then from Heathrow, London to CDG, Paris on April 21 and then from CDG, Paris to JFK, NYC on April 23
goal_pattern: Find the lowest travel time flight for 1 traveler from JFK, NYC to Heathrow, London on April 19, then from Heathrow, London to CDG, Paris on April 21 and then from CDG, Paris to JFK, NYC on April 23

applicability.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.
applicability.when_not_to_use: Do not use if the current task asks for a different flow or page area.

steps.selection_rule: Choose the current visible candidate whose label, role, or nearby text best matches the target description.
steps.success_signal: The page advances or the selected field reflects the intended value.
